title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama for LLM, chat, and embeddings in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Clean open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that talks to your local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Lightweight interactive CLI wrapper for chatting with Ollama models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform Flutter desktop app for browsing, pulling and chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing sync/async APIs, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation template using Ollama + Chroma for private QA bots.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for running Ollama in Kubernetes with GPU and autoscaling options.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for Ollama’s REST API with async HTTP, streaming, and strong type support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir library wrapping Ollama for Phoenix apps; chat, embed, and model management.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C#/.NET client for Ollama supporting .NET 6+, streaming, and cancellation tokens.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting pipelines use Ollama models for generative and embedding nodes.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bot (Bolt JS) that queries a local Ollama instance and responds in threads with markdown.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for summarizing notes and Q&A using local Ollama models without cloud calls.
